mapper.select: SELECT contact_id, client_id, writer_id, contact_name, contact_position, contact_email, contact_tel, created_at, updated_at FROM contacts WHERE contact_id = #{contactId}
SELECT contact_id, client_id, writer_id, contact_name, contact_position, contact_email, contact_tel, created_at, updated_at FROM contacts ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT contact_id, client_id, writer_id, contact_name, contact_position, contact_email, contact_tel, created_at, updated_at FROM contacts WHERE client_id = #{clientId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
